actions_summary: Modified RDS parameter group to restore replication after primary failover
Manually scaled EKS nodes during DDoS mitigation — kubectl applied emergency HPA config
Restarted failed health check instances in ASG during deployment rollback
Root login to modify RDS instance class during primary failure — required root for reserved instance modification. Restored service by 03:22 AM.
Emergency pod eviction and node drain during cluster instability
Terminated runaway EC2 instances causing cost spike and resource exhaustion
API gateway outage — restarted API gateway instances and cleared connection pool
